segments.text: And David sang this song to the LORD on the day the LORD had delivered him from the hand of all his enemies and from the hand of Saul.
He said:
The LORD is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My God is my rock, in whom I take refuge, my shield, and the horn of my salvation. My stronghold, my refuge, and my Savior, You save me from violence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will call upon the LORD, who is worthy to be praised; so shall I be saved from my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For the waves of death engulfed me; the torrents of chaos overwhelmed me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The cords of Sheol entangled me; the snares of death confronted me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In my distress I called upon the LORD; I cried out to my God. And from His temple He heard my voice, and my cry for help reached His ears.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text:
Then the earth shook and quaked; the foundations of the heavens trembled;
they were shaken because He burned with anger.
segments.speaker: He

segments.text:
Smoke rose from His nostrils, and consuming fire came from His mouth;
glowing coals blazed forth.
segments.speaker: He

segments.text: He parted the heavens and came downwith dark clouds beneath His feet.
segments.speaker: He

segments.text: He mounted a cherub and flew; He soared on the wings of the wind.
segments.speaker: He

segments.text: He made darkness a canopy around Him, a gathering of water and thick clouds.
segments.speaker: He

segments.text: From the brightness of His presencecoals of fire blazed forth.
segments.speaker: He

segments.text: The LORD thundered from heaven; the voice of the Most High resounded.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He shot His arrows and scattered the foes; He hurled lightning and routed them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The channels of the sea appeared, and the foundations of the world were exposedat the rebuke of the LORD, at the blast of the breath of His nostrils.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He reached down from on high and took hold of me; He drew me out of deep waters.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He rescued me from my powerful enemy, from foes too mighty for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They confronted me in my day of calamity, but the LORD was my support.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He brought me out into the open; He rescued me because He delighted in me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD has rewarded me according to my righteousness; He has repaid me according to the cleanness of my hands.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For I have kept the ways of the LORD and have not wickedly departed from my God.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For all His ordinances are before me; I have not disregarded His statutes.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And I have been blameless before Him and kept myself from iniquity.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: So the LORD has repaid me according to my righteousness, according to my cleanness in His sight.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: To the faithful You show Yourself faithful, to the blameless You show Yourself blameless;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: to the pure You show Yourself pure, but to the crooked You show Yourself shrewd.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You save an afflicted people, but Your eyes are on the haughty to bring them down.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For You, O LORD, are my lamp; the LORD lights up my darkness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For in You I can charge an army; with my God I can scale a wall.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: As for God, His way is perfect; the word of the LORD is flawless. He is a shield to all who take refuge in Him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For who is God besides the LORD? And who is the Rock except our God?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: God is my strong fortress and He makes my way clear.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He makes my feet like those of a deer and stations me upon the heights.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He trains my hands for battle; my arms can bend a bow of bronze.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have given me Your shield of salvation, and Your gentleness exalts me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You broaden the path beneath meso that my ankles do not give way.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I pursued my enemies and destroyed them; I did not turn back until they were consumed.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I devoured and crushed them so they could not rise; they have fallen under my feet.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have armed me with strength for battle; You have subdued my foes beneath me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have made my enemies retreat before me; I put an end to those who hated me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They looked, but there was no one to save them—to the LORD, but He did not answer.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I ground them as the dust of the earth; I crushed and trampled them like mud in the streets.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text:
You have delivered me from the strife of my people; You have preserved me as the head of nations;
a people I had not known shall serve me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Foreigners cower before me; when they hear me, they obey me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Foreigners lose heart and come trembling from their strongholds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD lives, and blessed be my Rock! And may God, the Rock of my salvation, be exalted—
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: the God who avenges me and brings down nations beneath me,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: who frees me from my enemies. You exalt me above my foes; You rescue me from violent men.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Therefore I will praise You, O LORD, among the nations; I will sing praises to Your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text:
Great salvation He brings to His king. He shows loving devotion to His anointed,
to David and his descendants forever.
segments.speaker: David
